title: opskit Environment Contract
description: Schema for environments/<env>/env.yml — declares an environment to every opskit component.

name.description: Machine-readable environment name (directory name). Lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for UI, logs, and reports.

prefix.description: Ticket prefix for commit hooks (e.g. CS, BMS, YC, EX).

helpdesk_endpoint.description: API endpoint for the helpdesk (required if helpdesk != none).

helpdesk_tenant.description: Tenant identifier for ERPNext helpdesk (e.g. cs, bms).

additional.description: Additional domains managed by this environment.

subnets.description: Named subnets keyed by role (mgmt, servers, clients, iot, etc.). Values are CIDR strings.

vpn_bringup.description: Command or script to bring up VPN to this environment (optional, for remote envs).

collection.description: Vaultwarden collection name or OpenBao mount path for this environment's secrets.

item.description: Credential item name to allow access to.

cross_env_credentials.description: Explicit allowlist for cross-environment credential access.

type.description: Canonical source of truth. netbox = NetBox is canonical, git-yaml datasets are exports. git-yaml = YAML files in datasets/ are canonical.

netbox_token_ref.description: Vault item name containing the NetBox API token (required if type=netbox).

export_path.description: Local path for generated YAML exports from NetBox (relative to env directory).

type.description: Playbook execution method. cli = ansible-playbook directly. semaphore = Semaphore UI.

semaphore_project.description: Semaphore project name for this environment.

device.description: Device name in the owning environment.

reason.description: Why this environment references it (e.g. 'carries VLANs 40,50').

referenced_devices.description: Devices owned by other environments that this environment references read-only.

ssh_user.description: Default SSH user for Ansible connections.

ssh_jump.description: SSH jump host alias for this environment.

topology.description: Network topology configuration for uplink resolution and validation.

router.description: Hostname of the core router — used as the root node for uplink chain validation.

router_ssh.description: SSH alias for pulling bridge host table + LLDP neighbors (e.g. 'my-router').
